svg.text: Spec 3 — Berth Preference: Explicit Contract & Pre-Payment Confirmation
Two screens: A) Passenger form (modified) · B) Review screen (redesigned) · States: All-high / One-mismatch / All-mismatch / Inventory-unavailable / 6-passenger collapsed

g.text: Inline disclosure when specific berth selected
NEW — appears as soon as a non-default
berth is selected. Sets the contract early:
"Lower" is a request, not a guarantee.
Screen B1 · Review · All passengers HIGH
Happy path — green pills, no banner
Pay button enabled in 2s — please review allocation
Amber banner — user decides before paying
Lower berths sold out at this time
User makes decision while seat is
Red banner — strong recommendation to switch trains
Requested: Lower → Will be: Side Upper
by Railways. Lower berth request noted.
Same as today's behaviour — but at least labelled
Avoids dense scrolling on mobile — expandable
User finds out wrong berth in SMS.
Decision moves before money is debited.
